```python
import sys

def compute_failure(pattern):
    n = len(pattern)
    fail = [0] * n
    j = 0
    for i in range(1, n):
        while j > 0 and pattern[i] != pattern[j]:
            j = fail[j - 1]
        if pattern[i] == pattern[j]:
            j += 1
            fail[i] = j
        else:
            fail[i] = 0
    return fail

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + rev_s
    fail = compute_failure(combined)
    longest_prefix_suffix = fail[-1]
    return s + rev_s[:len(s) - longest_prefix_suffix]

def main():
    s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(s))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
